summary: Iteration 4 PASS — All 14 review-request acceptance criteria verified. Backend: 6/6 pytest cases pass for /api/contact (valid submission, optional company, EmailStr 422, missing-required 422, empty-message 422, persistence to contact_submissions Mongo collection with id+submitted_at+email_sent=false). Frontend: pricing /pricing renders 3+2 layout with correct headings ('Choose how you start.' / 'For executives, organizations & high-risk individuals.' + 'White-glove tier' pill); row-1 cards on same Y (379px wide), row-2 cards on same Y (578px wide, ~52% wider as required); all 5 prices correct USD ($4.99/$19.99/$49.99-MostPopular/$99.99/$249.99); INR toggle flips on all 5 plans; all 4 benefit badges (SOC 2 Type II, Custom data residency, Dedicated analyst & CSM, 99.99% uptime SLA) present on both row-2 cards; Credit Usage shows 6 services. Contact page: POST /api/contact captured at status=200, returns {ok:true,email_sent:false,message:'Thanks…'}, success toast visible, form clears. Mobile (390×844 & 375×812): brand perfectly centered (centerX=195/188 vs viewport-center 195/187.5), hamburger on LEFT (x=12), desktop navbar-signup hidden, drawer opens with mobile-signup + pricing/contact links, brand-motto hidden (hidden md:flex), zero horizontal overflow on /, /pricing, /contact, /about, /blog, /blog/1.6b-records-breach-trends-2026, /email-monitoring, /individuals.

issues: Brand text 'Track The Breach' wraps to 2 lines next to the centered logo because the brand row sits between the left hamburger (x=12) and the right 40px spacer leaving ~270px usable width. Cosmetic only — logo+text remain centered and within tap targets. Optional: shrink text to text-[13px] below 380px or wrap the text in whitespace-nowrap + slightly smaller logo for one-line presentation on iPhone-SE-class widths.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/contact: success path returns 200 with ok:true even when SMTP delivery fails (caught and logged) — this is intentional per the 'optional Gmail SMTP delivery' design but worth surfacing: callers cannot distinguish 'SMTP not configured' from 'SMTP failed at runtime' since both yield email_sent:false. Consider adding email_error field surface in response for ops visibility (currently only stored in Mongo).

server.py: logger is referenced inside _send_email() (line 89) but defined later at line 156 — works because _send_email is only called at request time after module init, but ordering is fragile. Move logging.basicConfig + logger = getLogger(__name__) above the function definitions.

Contact.jsx form has no client-side honeypot or rate-limit hint — backend /api/contact has no rate limiting either; trivially spammable once endpoint is public. Add a simple IP-based throttle (e.g., 5 req/min) or hidden honeypot field before launch.
Pricing.jsx is 313 lines — within limit but the Cell helper + PLAN_COLORS array could be extracted to /components/pricing/ for reuse if more tiers are added.

Navbar.jsx mobile center brand uses absolute-positioning trick (left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2) — works perfectly at 390+, but at 375 the text wraps because available width between left hamburger and right spacer is ~270px. Consider whitespace-nowrap + smaller text-[13px] below sm breakpoint.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth on this site
seed_data_creation: Test submissions inserted into contact_submissions Mongo collection are prefixed with TEST_ in the name field and auto-cleaned by the pytest module-scoped fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend: POST /api/contact (pydantic ContactSubmission: name/email/reason/message required, company optional). Returns {ok, email_sent, message}. SMTP creds blank in /app/backend/.env by design — _send_email() short-circuits and returns False; submission still persisted. EmailStr triggers 422 on invalid emails. To re-run backend tests: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_contact.py -v. Frontend testids in use: pricing-page, pricing-plan-0..4, pricing-cta-0..4, currency-usd, currency-inr, credit-usage-0..5, contact-page, contact-form, contact-name, contact-email, contact-company, contact-reason, contact-message, contact-submit, contact-book-demo, contact-reason-0..5, site-navbar, brand-motto, navbar-logo, navbar-login, navbar-signup, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu, mobile-pricing, mobile-contact, mobile-login, mobile-signup. The /api/contact endpoint is MOCKED for email delivery (SMTP_USER/SMTP_PASS/ADMIN_EMAIL blank in /app/backend/.env — submissions persist to MongoDB but no email leaves the server). Iteration-3 regressions (5 plans, blog detail, sitemap, JSON-LD, container 1240px, transparent logo, no 'Identity Intelligence' subtitle) all still PASS.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found in iteration 4.
